min_nodes.description: Minimum number of nodes for the compute pool.

max_nodes.description: Maximum number of nodes for the compute pool.

instance_family.description: Instance family for the compute pool.

auto_resume.description: Whether Snowflake automatically resumes the compute pool when any statement that requires the compute pool is submitted.

state.description: Current state of the compute pool. Possible values include UNKNOWN, STARTING, IDLE, ACTIVE, STOPPING, SUSPENDED, and RESIZING.

num_services.description: Number of services on the compute pool.

num_jobs.description: Number of jobs on the compute pool.

auto_suspend_secs.description: Number of seconds until the compute pool automatically suspends.

active_nodes.description: Number of currently active nodes on the compute pool.

idle_nodes.description: Number of currently idle nodes on the compute pool.

target_nodes.description: Number of target nodes on the compute pool.

created_on.description: Time the compute pool was created.

resumed_on.description: Time the compute pool was last resumed.

updated_on.description: Time the compute pool was last updated.

owner.description: Identifier for the current owner of the compute pool.

is_exclusive.description: Whether a compute pool is created exclusively for a Snowflake Native App.

application.description: Name of the Snowflake Native App if the compute pool is created exclusively for the app.

budget.description: The name of the budget monitoring the credit usage of the compute pool.

error_code.description: Current error the compute pool hit if any.

status_message.description: Current status of the compute pool if any.

example.name: compute_pool_name
example.status_message: Compute Pool is resizing for last 10 minutes. We have observed CAPACITY_ERROR. Please refer to our documentation.
